prompt: This document is to be published on the UK GOV.UK government website. It may apply to one or more of the nations of the UK (England, Wales, Scotland or Northern Ireland). State whether it applies to England and give a short explanation (less than 100 words) for your decision.
reason: This document discusses proven reoffending statistics specifically for offenders in England and Wales, with references to data and analysis pertaining to the criminal justice system in England. The terminology and statistics presented imply a focus on England's legal framework.
